overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a waterfront promenade beneath a massive highway overpass. The journey transitions from a sunlit open seating area through a dark neon-lit tunnel to a stairway exit, showcasing futuristic urban architecture with neon signage and concrete infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with outdoor seating under highway overpass

events.description: passing by pedestrians seated on concrete benches to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade beneath the overpass, passing outdoor seating areas

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing sitting on concrete bench
couple walking together along the promenade

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass forming a ceiling overhead
tall palm tree in a raised concrete planter box
concrete benches and seating areas with people resting
body of water running parallel to the walkway with reflections
multi-level highway bridge with teal structural accents
tall buildings with neon signage and glass facades

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit waterfront promenade beneath a massive concrete overpass. Palm trees and outdoor seating line the left side where NPCs are seated, while a canal reflects the light to the right. Futuristic skyscrapers with neon accents rise in the distance beyond the elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under highway overpass with water views

events.description: entering deeper shadow as the overpass coverage increases, reducing direct sunlight
digital billboard with 'IT'S BIG' text becomes visible on the right wall ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing walk under the overpass with views of the water and distant city architecture

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper under the overpass into a transitional zone with mixed lighting. The walkway is now empty of pedestrians, with massive concrete support pillars lining the path. The elevated highway structure looms closer ahead while the canal remains visible to the right, and a digital billboard appears in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed underpass tunnel with digital advertisements and graffiti

events.description: entering fully enclosed dark tunnel section with illuminated digital billboards
approaching tunnel exit with increasing natural light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark underpass tunnel passing glowing advertisements on the walls

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement displaying a burrito with text 'IT'S BIG' in white letters
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
low concrete dividers and planters along the left edge of walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dark enclosed tunnel section beneath the highway. The environment is artificially lit by a large glowing digital billboard advertising food on the right wall, surrounded by graffiti. The space feels narrow and urban, with concrete barriers lining the path and the overpass ceiling now appearing higher and darker.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass exit with stairway access to upper level

events.description: exiting the dark tunnel into a brighter area with visible stairway leading upward

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the underpass where stairs lead up to street level, passing a pedestrian

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket walking toward the camera from the stairway area

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with railings leading up to the street level above
bright natural daylight visible at the tunnel exit opening

segments.scene_description: Approaching the end of the underpass tunnel where bright daylight streams in from the exit. A wide concrete staircase leads upward to the street level, and a pedestrian in a yellow jacket walks toward the camera. The environment transitions from the dark enclosed tunnel back to a semi-open space with access to the upper city levels.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright waterfront promenade into a dark urban underpass before emerging back into the daylight. It begins along a sunlit walkway lined with palm trees and outdoor seating, with a reflective canal to the right and futuristic skyscrapers looming beyond a massive concrete overpass. As the camera moves deeper beneath the highway structure, the pedestrians vanish and the lighting dims, shifting the focus toward towering concrete support pillars and a distant digital billboard. The scene then narrows into a dark, enclosed tunnel where the environment is illuminated by a glowing food advertisement and graffiti-covered walls. Finally, the camera approaches the end of the tunnel as bright daylight streams in from a wide concrete staircase leading upward toward the city street level.
